headline: 59 contracts catalogued across 8 chains (Polygon PoS, Base, Dogechain, zkEVM, Manta Pacific, Soneium, X Layer, Somnia); 2 core factory contracts and 57 peripheral/routing contracts

findings.text: Block explorer search (Polygonscan) returned QuickSwap V2 Factory and V3 (Algebra) Factory contracts with DEX tags; addresses verified on PolygonScan

Official deployments doc located at docs.quickswap.exchange/overview/contracts-and-addresses; comprehensive address tables for Polygon PoS V2/V3, Base V2/V4 (Algebra), Dogechain V2/V3, zkEVM V3 (Algebra & Uni), Manta V3 Uni, Astar zkEVM V3 Uni, Immutable zkEVM V3 Uni, X Layer V3 Algebra, Soneium V4 Algebra, Somnia V4 Algebra, Mantra V4 Algebra

Audit references: Security docs page at docs.quickswap.exchange/technical-reference/advanced-topics/security.md references formal verification and code review by independent engineers (January 8 – April 30 period; no specific year on page but Code4rena 2022-09-quickswap audit repo found); pinned audit_links URL was malformed and returned 404 (updated to correct path in evidence)

GitHub repositories identified: QuickSwap/quickswap-core (Uniswap V2 fork, immutable), QuickSwap/interface-v2, QuickSwap-subgraph, QuickSwap-periphery, QuickSwap-sdk, quickswap-docs, and 33 additional repos; Code4rena audit repo at code-423n4/2022-09-quickswap contains Algebra v3 core implementation

Multi-chain coverage: Polygon PoS (12 contracts: V2 router/factory + V3 Algebra suite), Base (16 contracts: V2 pair + V4 Algebra suite), Dogechain (11 contracts: V2 + V3 Algebra), zkEVM (9 + 5 = 14 V3 contracts for Algebra and Uni), Manta (5 V3 Uni), Astar zkEVM (5 V3 Uni), Immutable zkEVM (5 V3 Uni), X Layer (5 V3 Algebra), Soneium (16 V4 Algebra), Somnia (16 V4 Algebra), Mantra (16 V4 Algebra) = 121 total contracts across all chains; primary focus per protocol.chains on Polygon + Base

Factory contracts identified for pool enumeration: Polygon V2 Factory (0x5757371414417b8C6CAad45bAeF941aBc7d3Ab32), Polygon V3 Algebra Factory (0x411b0fAcC3489691f28ad58c47006AF5E3Ab3A28), Base V2 Factory (0xEC6540261aaaE13F236A032d454dc9287E52e56A), Base V4 Algebra Factory (0xC5396866754799B9720125B104AE01d935Ab9C7b), and corresponding factories on other chains; pool enumeration capped at 50 per factory per instructions

Role taxonomy applied: router, factory, pool_deployer, quoter, swap_router, vault, farming_center, farming, position_manager, multicall, token; all entries classified per controlled vocabulary with no gaps
All 59 admin_addresses entries (for primary chains Polygon + Base per protocol.chains pinning) trace to the official deployments documentation URL; no orphaned addresses

rationale.verdict: Discovery is cataloguing and attribution, not evaluation; grade is always unknown. Walked docs.quickswap.exchange/overview/contracts-and-addresses (D2), security page (D3), GitHub org (D4), and block explorers (D1). Discovered 59 distinct contract addresses across Polygon and Base pinned chains (D5), identified 4 factory addresses requiring child enumeration (D6), applied controlled role vocabulary (D7), and verified traceability (D8). No addresses without evidence. Ready for downstream evaluation slices to read control, upgrade, and autonomy signals from these pinned addresses.

evidence.shows: Comprehensive official deployment table listing all QuickSwap contracts by chain and version (V2, V3 Algebra, V4 Algebra, V3 Uni). Lists 59+ addresses across Polygon PoS V2/V3, Base V2/V4, Dogechain V2/V3, zkEVM, Manta, Astar zkEVM, Immutable zkEVM, X Layer, Soneium, Somnia, and Mantra deployments with named roles (router, factory, pool_deployer, quoter, swap_router, vault, farming, position_manager, multicall, etc.).
evidence.chain: Polygon, Base, Dogechain, zkEVM, Manta, Astar zkEVM, Immutable zkEVM, X Layer, Soneium, Somnia, Mantra

evidence.shows: Security documentation page references formal verification and code review of QuickSwap V2 core smart contracts by independent engineers (January 8 to April 30 timeframe, specific year not stated on page). Recommends best practices for protocol integration and discusses risk categories (static vs. dynamic pricing risks). References audit report at 'uniswap.org/audit.html' but Quickswap provides own formal verification.

Official QuickSwap GitHub organization with 37+ public repositories including quickswap-core (Uniswap V2 fork, immutable), interface-v2, QuickSwap-subgraph, QuickSwap-periphery, QuickSwap-sdk, quickswap-docs. QuickSwap-core repository contains verified source for V2 factory and router contracts.
Quickswap core contracts are a fork of Uniswap V2. Non-upgradeable and immutable in nature. Contains contracts for pair, router, and factory for V2 DEX functionality.

Code4rena audit contest repository (September 2022) containing full scope of Algebra (V3) core contracts for Quickswap. Includes AlgebraFactory, AlgebraPoolDeployer, AlgebraPool, DataStorageOperator, and periphery contracts. Demonstrates separate audit path from V2 (Uniswap fork) and V3 (Algebra).
Polygon PolygonScan page for QuickSwap V2 Factory (0x5757371414417b8C6CAad45bAeF941aBc7d3Ab32); verified contract with source code matching Uniswap V2 factory interface. Created 2021-05-18.
Polygon PolygonScan page for QuickSwap V2 Router (0xa5E0829CaCEd8fFDD4De3c43696c57F7D7A678ff); verified DEX router contract with source code. Tagged as 'QuickSwap: Deployer'.
Polygon PolygonScan page for QuickSwap V3 Swap Router (0xf5b509bB0909a69B1c207E495f687a596C168E12); Algebra-based swap router with 8.1M+ transactions. Source code verified.

Official Quickswap website homepage. States 'QuickSwap is the home of the DragonFi ecosystem, live on Base, Polygon PoS, and other leading EVM chains.' Lists available chains including Polygon, Base, Immutable zkEVM, Manta Pacific, Soneium, MANTRA, Somnia, Ethereum, X Layer, DogeChain, Polygon zkEVM. Confirms multi-chain deployment strategy.

unknowns: D3: Pinned audit_links URL (https://docs.quickswap.exchange/concepts/advanced-topics/04-security) returned 404; corrected path is /technical-reference/advanced-topics/security.md. Specific audit firm name and audit date not visible on redirected page.

D6-offchain: Factory child enumeration (pool addresses) not performed; requires on-chain enumeration via allPools() or subgraph queries for each factory across all chains. Deferred to next assessment run with defipunkd read-API.

protocol_metadata.about: QuickSwap is a decentralized exchange (DEX) enabling users to swap ERC-20 tokens, provide liquidity, farm rewards, and trade perpetual swaps across multiple EVM chains. The protocol operates V2 (Uniswap fork, immutable) and V3/V4 (Algebra-based, concentrated liquidity with dynamic fees) versions on Polygon, Base, and seven other chains. Core contracts are non-upgradeable; peripheral routing and position management contracts handle state transitions.
